title: Quran, Sura 111: Al-Masad
description: Sura 111 (Al-Masad: The Palm Fiber) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 111 (Al-Masad: The Palm Fiber) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: May the hands of Abu Lahab be ruined, and ruined is he. His wealth will not avail him or that which he gained.
